Remove ribs from kale and rough chop
Blanch Kale in boiling water, shock in ice water.
Drain and squeeze the kale dry of all excess water
Blend in a vitamix with the shallots, salt, sugar, and lemon juice.
Use some of the grapeseed oil to assist in blending, using the vitamix plunger or a ladle to work product into a vortex
Slowly add the pistachios, then pour in the remaining grapeseed oil to emulsify.
Reserve to quart containers and cool in the blast chiller or an ice bath
Store in the cooler.
